meta.title: Senior Fellow Richard Weitz on Secretary Clinton's Visit to Korea
meta.description: Hudson Institute Senior Fellow and Director of the Center for Political-Military Analysis discusses Secretary of State Hillary Clinton's visit to Korea and nuclear fuel issues
